response:
KEEP THE AREA CLEAN: BRUSH GENTLY, RINSE WITH WATER, AVOID FOOD PARTICLES. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* CLEANING THE TOOTH IS ESSENTIAL TO PREVENT MORE DAMAGE. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* USE SOFT BRUSHES AND RINSE TO MAINTAIN HYGIENE. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* THIS HELPS IN PREVENTING INFECTION AND PAIN. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* 

* * *

USE TEMPORARY FILLING MATERIALS: APPLY CAREFULLY, FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS, AVOID DAMAGE. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* TEMPORARY FILLS CAN PROTECT THE TOOTH UNTIL DENTIST VISIT. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* THIS IS A SHORT-TERM SOLUTION TO MAINTAIN TOOTH STRUCTURE. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* DO NOT USE FOR LONG PERIODS WITHOUT PROFESSIONAL CARE. 

* * *

MONITOR FOR CHANGES: WATCH FOR PAIN, SWELLING, BAD TASTE, INFECTION. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* IF YOU SEE ANY CHANGES, SEEK DENTAL CARE SOON. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* DO NOT DELAY TREATMENT TO AVOID SEVERE PROBLEMS. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* BOX AND CAR CAN HELP IN FINDING DENTAL CARE IN DIFFERENT LOCATIONS. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* TRADITION OF GOOD ORAL HYGIENE IS IMPORTANT FOR TWO MAIN REASONS. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION* TWO MAIN REASONS ARE PREVENTION AND HEALTH MAINTENANCE.
